role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation type, and climate cues effectively.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed forest composition and seasonal leaf drop patterns.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings and guardrail types.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized infrastructure details (poles, guardrails) and image quality.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline failed because the image lacked specific linguistic or regulatory markers for Panama, leading agents to default to the most visually similar region (Southeast Asia). The agents' reasoning was internally consistent and grounded in the visual evidence, but the evidence itself was ambiguous across regions.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described tropical deciduous forest and rolling hills.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately described mixed canopy and leaf drop.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described W-beam guardrail and yellow center line.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described utility pole and image quality.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The ground truth (Panama) was not included in the candidate pool. The agents failed to identify Panama because the visual evidence (tropical forest, yellow center line, W-beam guardrail) is not unique to Panama and strongly overlaps with Southeast Asian regions. The agents defaulted to the most visually similar region (Thailand/Vietnam/Laos) rather than considering other tropical regions like Central America.
